headlines.description: — Brandon Ingram scored a season-high 38 points, RJ Barrett had 22 and the Toronto Raptors moved closer to clinching their first playoff berth since 2022 by beating the slumping Miami Heat 128-114 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Ingram scores season-high 38, Raptors move closer to playoff berth by beating slumping Heat 128-114

tracking.trackingName: NBA_One-Play (Chicago Bulls vs. Washington Wizards: Game Highlights) 2026/04/09 ESHEET

headlines.description: — Leonard Miller scored a career-high 26 points and matched his career best with 11 rebounds as the Chicago Bulls eased to a 119-108 victory over the Washington Wizards on Thursday night to sweep a two-game set.
headlines.shortLinkText: Leonard Miller's career night paces Bulls to 119-108 win over Wizards

headlines.description: — Obi Toppin had 26 points and nine rebounds and seven Indiana players scored in double figures as the Pacers snapped a three-game skid with a 123-94 win over the Brooklyn Nets on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: Pacers get double-digit scoring from 7 players in a 123-94 win over the Nets

headlines.description: — LeBron James had 26 points, 11 assists and eight rebounds but didn't get to compete against rival and pal Stephen Curry as the Los Angeles Lakers beat the Golden State Warriors 119-103 on Thursday night.
headlines.shortLinkText: LeBron James has 26 points, 11 assists to lead Lakers past Warriors 119-103 as Stephen Curry sits
